Eyalarasan

"He carries the mountains in his eyes
and the whole sky in his laugh."

💚us together

my hand, your arm, always 💚

a letter, just for you

My dearest Eyalarasan,

I used to think birthdays were just days. And then I met you — someone who treats every sunrise like a new trail to follow, who finds magic in leaves and rivers and the sound of rain on soil. You changed how I see the world.

You make me want to slow down. To notice things. To breathe properly. I love that about you more than you'll ever know.

So today is yours. Every beautiful corner of it. I hope this year takes you everywhere your heart is pointing, and I hope you let me be part of some of it.

Thank you for being exactly who you are — wild, warm, and wonderfully you.

Forever yours 💚
🤍

Happy Birthday,
my favourite person.

May every trail lead somewhere breathtaking 🌿

MADE WITH LOVE · ALWAYS
